verses.text: Judah's border is traced from the south to the great sea. Judah. The chief tribe's bounds.

Caleb takes Hebron, driving out the giants. Caleb. The bold inherit.

Achsah asks her father for springs of water. Achsah. She seeks a fuller blessing.
